series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence received from the various political subdivisions (federal, city, county, township, village, etc.) requesting eligibility for gratis license plates, procedures, requirements, etc. Also includes correspondence dealing with sections of the law that requires gratis plates. Correspondence is filed by applicant''s name. The file contains Gratis Unit multi-shipment reports (issued daily on shipment of all gratis issued plates, covert and fictitious copies are shredded daily on site).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 1 year in Gratis Unit, then transfer to Record Center. They are stored there for 3 years, then destroyed., Paper: Shred
